features.evidence: 1 port under the hood you got access to a pair of sodiums two nvme slots and the wi fi card regarding inputs the 17 inch msi delivers these are the best nor the worst typing experience we have encountered lately key travel is pretty shallow and i would have preferred a more pronounced pressure point so while this will hardly be a satisfying keyboard for hardcore typists i would still say that one could get used to this rather quickly the large touchpad offered no reason to complain during our time with these stealth 17 studio in the display department msi equipped a creator focused stealth with a 17 inch 4k mini led display refreshing at a snappy 144hz while sdr brightness offers no reason to ride home about with around 400 nits on average hdr brightness can reach up to 1200 nits during our measurements contrast numbers are also impressive as we have seen on other mini led displays so far and yes for games and movies this display is simply amazing but i must admit i am personally very undecided when it comes to using mini leds for creative work such as video creating or photo editing while color gamut coverage might a little in dc ip3 srgb and especially adobe rgb coverage with above 90 is very nice to see but given that the mini leds do not offer a constant or uniform backlight by nature it can get very tricky to judge contrast and color on a professional level since you get subtle halos in high contrast areas it is for example almost impossible to reliably work on commercial grade photoshop edits since you simply do not know if gradients or brightness irregularities come from the image you re working on or the non uniform backlight so while msi offers very handy color presets especially as rgb is important for creating video files for example i wish they would implement ways to get the mini leds to act as a uniform single zone backlight but for now only as zeus is offering this for their panels regarding cpu performance the stealth delivers numbers on par with the competition utilizing this same chip the r9 3900h can run with up to 135 watts for a very short period of time but levets out at 95 watts during sustained full cpu loads in our cinebench r15 loop the 17 inch up performs therefore within spinning distance of the arrow 16 and rgm16 featuring the same chip in our combined cpu rating a score that is made up of several different cpu benchmarks the i9 sits in the middle between last year s fastest other leg cpus and what is on offer in the high end segment in while the mainstream i9 cannot quite keep up with intel s hx platform or the amd 7945hx it sits atop other 13th gen h equipped notebooks and should hardly leave you wanting for the most common cpu only applications system performance is excellent as are shown by our pcmox scores even though scores in this categories are usually very close to each other but i was daily driving this one for some time and the subjective performance impression was excellent at least as long as you re connected to an outlet as it is quite common for powerful windows notebooks on battery performance takes a huge hit for example a pc mark on battery only delivered around 5500 points which is about 30 less than what you get plugged in during our benchmarks triumph speeds are excellent but show thralling another prolonged heavy use alright folks let s talk about the gpu apart from gaming a lot of your typical creative applications are gpu accelerated nowadays so it would be very interesting to see how the rtx 4080 fares in the studio it is also amongst the first cards to run at a much lower wattage than the maximum of 175 watts specified by nvidia the msi stealth the second best ada mobile gpus allowed a maximum of 105 watts so let s see how that places it amongst its rtx 4000 siblings and what was available last year in our combined 3d mark rating performance is pretty impressive despite the lower wattage and puts the stealth about 10 to 15 ahead of last year s flagship the rtx 3080 ti while this doesn t sound much you have to keep in mind that some of those 3080 tis in our comparison group have been running at 160 watts or more making the 2020 34080 not only more powerful but also a lot more efficient allowing it to deliver a ton of gpu performance in such a slim chassis should you be into zgi and using blender the stealth could also prove to be a reliable partner it performs on par with other rtx 4080s and can easily outperform everything from last year octane bench delivers similar results so it does not seem the lower wattage is holding back to 17 inch notebook a lot with this workload i also took the msi for a spin for our video production and was very pleased with the overall experience timeline performance has been very decent playing back our blackmagic raw footage without any problems and to give you guys an idea of what to expect when it comes to export times i compared some of the laptops in the studio with our latest alienware x15 video should you be at home in the adobe suite photoshop as well as premiere scores look very promising as well and especially photoshop benefits tremendously from the generous amount of system memory and fast nvme ssd but enough about work for now what about those afterward gaming sessions in our combined trading comprised of mostly older games tested at 1080p the lower wattage seems to be much more apparent delivering only marginally better fps than the 3080 ti and last year s alienware x17 for example that said the stealth 17 studio is still in adequate performer and can easily deliver playable frame rates in 1080p and qhd 60fps on the problem at all and an older or less demanding games you can even get close to the display s native 144hz refresh rate 4k is mostly doable as well unless it gets very demanding and especially if ray tracing comes into play at this point you should definitely take advantage of dlss or even frame generation should it be available for the games you are playing for example the cyberpunk 2077 wasn t playable at all in 4k with ray tracing and ultra settings running at a measly 14 fps with dlss in its quality setting it was still pretty choppy with around 23 fps but frame generation bumped it up to an average of 55 frames giving you a much better gaming experience regarding fan noise the msi is doing okay it s fans or audible even in low load scenarios but never in a distracting way and under full load it is very reasonable it took some noise samples for you under various loads for now so you can get an idea of what to expect we will have some detailed numbers as soon as the written article is done so please be patient for now i will link it in the description and i will have the necessary equipment in the studio very soon as well so i can give you db numbers alongside the noise samples in the very near future before we get to battery life i also have to address a few issues we had with this stealth 17 studio when we first got it we had to deal with a few hiccups in terms of overall system stability and some issues with the keyboard thankfully those have been quickly resolved completely with the latest firmware updates so should you get one of these for yourself and run into any problems check if there are any updates available apart from this we only had some problems with switching between different gpu modes resulting in less than ideal idle power consumption and also directly impacting battery life we are investigating the problem right now and we will update you on that as soon as we have pinpointed the problem while you will hardly expect all day runtimes from a big 17 inch mini led equipped notebook the msi offered nothing to write home about in terms of battery life three and a half hours away from the wall and our wi fi standard tests aren t great to be quite honest and some competing laptops do much better in this regard alright guys it s time to wrap this up for today so what makes for a good create a laptop i guess it s a very complicated question to begin with since it s such a large field in general as for my creator workflows when it comes to video editing for this very channel and some of my retouching work the msi delivered a very solid experience especially photoshop profits from the memory config fast cpu and speedy ssd resolve 18 also does very well with the latest cpu and gpu pairings and with its solid i o and sleek chassis the stealth 17 studio makes for a very compelling workstation option in my opinion that s it color critical work without an external display is a bit problematic with the mini led display while it is absolutely amazing for consuming content i would love to see msi implement a one zone toggle option for the backlight which would help tremendously when working with photos or creating video footage but please guys let me know what you think about this stealth studio and especially what makes a great content creation notebook for you by the way we put affiliate links to the 17 incher as well as everything else you could see in our video in the description below if you want to get anything for yourself that would be it for today thanks a ton for watching please leave a on your way out and consider subscribing if you haven t already my name is alex you have been absolutely fantastic and i cannot wait to see you all in the next one take care
value: average battery life in hours: 2 Hours

making a performance laptop really thin is super hard i was once told by an engineer from a laptop company that at a certain point if you want to shrink the height of a laptop by another millimeter it s an extra million dollars in r d it s very difficult to do and the thing is a lot of companies chase it they want to make these thinner and thinner devices and it comes with problems right you get thermal issues you get keyboard issues you get just limitations with the device when you go super thin but every company chases it and last year msi was guilty of it they made two devices i got them in they were way too thin the performance wasn t great i didn t even cover them but this year they didn t fall into that trap and they made these devices so much better so first we have a gaming device the ghost gs77 which is a little bit thicker and completely redesigned it s so much better and there s also the newly updated z16p so this is also a little bit thicker with the vapor chamber and it s a way better experience than it was last year so let s start here the gs77 it s an all new design and honestly i think it s about damn time because every year i ve reviewed the ghost gs whatever it feels the company was always so tunnel visioned on weight and thinness that it just took away from the product it just made the build quality suffer because of that pursuit of thinness and low weight this time around both the top and bottom panels are much more sturdy and the hinge even though it s mounted a little bit closer to the center it is a very solid feeling hinge supposedly it s got some zinc alloy for the components inside to make the hinge but you can just tell when you open and close this thing it just seems a properly built hinge but the more prominent example of better build quality is the cpanel the keyboard deck every year when they make a ghost product this deck up here has some perforation or grill where the air flow goes in they ve completely redesigned the thermal system so they don t need to rely on a grill anymore and just the top panels are so much better it s something that s bugged me forever about these devices it s good now finally the internals this time are also a more traditional layout so in the past the ghost products have had this flipped motherboard which i think kept the device a little bit thinner but it made serviceability much more difficult this time you have access to both ram slots your drives your wi fi card you have access to all of it and you can see that there s two big fans instead of a series of smaller fans and i think it helps just with the entire thermal system the keyboard s also been completely revamped it still has a number pad on the right but the keys are just a little bit more square more chiclet a little bit larger it s a nicer typing experience to me the rgb lighting is controllable in the software but it s not a particularly bright or vibrant series of rgbs that s i don t know more muted than you would expect on a device this the trackpad s a little bit bigger this year and i don t think there s anything i would complain about it s a average trackpad there is a fingerprint sensor on the rights which i don t love the aesthetics of it but it s there if you need it now let s talk about performance this is running a 3070 ti with the 12700h from intel and it s a great performer it s really good for 1080p gaming it s great for 1440p gaming the gpu however isn t the highest wattage option out there so there s going to be devices out there usually thicker that will have better performance with the same gpu but i think they ve done a really good job balancing performance with the thickness of the product and what s also interesting is the fan noise so traditionally when it comes to this product category the ghost gs products they have loud fans of the top end and it s not something you can avoid right super thin device with hot components you gotta crank the fans this time around it is so much quieter than i expected now on one hand i that i m someone who appreciates quiet systems and this is a quieter gaming laptop but on the other hand this is msi this is a company that so frequently pushes their systems hard and loud to get the best possible performance and i m surprised they capped this gpu at 105 watts i felt if you squeeze the fans a little bit harder it could have gone another 10 or 15 watts this system does not have a mux switch though some people get super sweaty about this stuff for the games that most people are playing at this type of resolution a muk switch isn t super important but still would have been nice to have seen the panel itself is a really nice gaming panel it s not as color accurate as the creative devices but it s super fast response time and refresh rate are top tier it is a 16 by 9 aspect ratio though so you do get a pretty sizable chin i personally this type of aspect ratio when it comes to gaming laptops but everyone s different and there s also a 1080p webcam up top the port layout is also quite different this year they really did change everything you got three ports on the back so you got your ac adapter your hdmi port as well as your ethernet and these are the ones that you don t disconnect and reconnect frequently right this is just stuff you have plugged in or not and that s just going out the back of the device keeps your sides clear and then all the removable stuff goes on the side so you have two usb a two usbc and a full size sd but the overall product is just way better than the ghost line has ever been it s finally properly made for a gaming device now i honestly think that they went down this trap of the pursuit of thinness and lightness and it just made the whole manufacturing engineering process for this product line stupid they were just trying to chase something that was not achievable and i think every year people complain this is a great device except it s not well made and the thermal issues and there s limitations it s all gone i think they fixed so much stuff of it this year it is a big device if you re looking for a 17 inch device though this is a really solid one also the pricing so i don t know exact pricing yet because it s pretty early on in the launch cycle but from what i ve seen this thing starts at eighteen hundred dollars and when it comes to thin performance devices of this caliber that s definitely one of the cheaper ones all right that s the gs77 next up where did i put it i ll be right back the z 16 p and this is a device that s a little more my speed so this is a great gaming device but it s also a great device for content creators so last year they had the z16 cool looking device very similar aesthetic to this but it was really thin to the point where they could only put an rtx 3060 in it and that was capped at 65 watts this year a little bit thicker vapor chamber now they ve bumped up that gpu limit to 95 watts and you can get up to 3080 ti it s just a way more thermally capable system now what separates this device from the average gaming laptop out there is two things first is the design aesthetic of it it s a much more elegant looking more muted matte gray finish to it it s got a nice machined elegant look to it but it s the screen this is the main difference between every other gaming laptop out there so this is a 16 by 10 aspect ratio screen but it s got amazing color characteristics it s super color accurate very bright but it still has a 165 hertz refresh rate so it s awesome for playing games on it now it is a glossy panel if you can catch it yeah you can see that reflection up there of the light it is a glossy panel and it s macbooks right they have the glossy finish it s something that not everyone s gonna appreciate and if you re playing games on it only and you have super bright environments and you can t control the lighting then this can be annoying but for me personally i love glossy screens i ve done videos on this in the past but it s just the option of having really nice color the moment you put on any matte finish you re just throwing a diffusion layer on the screen right and just colors are gonna be less vibrant having it glossy this is i love it but everyone s different now for creative work this is awesome and also this screen goes all the way back so if you have the pen you can use it for digital illustration and you have a nice glass surface to work on and if you ll notice when i open and close the device you can see the hinge just raises the device for some better airflow on the bottom but it s a overall way better performer than the z16 last year now performance wise we re looking at a fast cpu and a fast gpu but because this gpu is capped at 95 watts it isn t going to be as fast as that gs77 but for a 15 16 inch device this is a very solid performer now there is the same perforated grille at the top of the keyboard last year s device but the z series never had the same build quality issues as the ghost gs products did so this has always been a very solid feeling device the keyboard isn t my favorite it types well but it does feel a little cramped to me to have a number pad on a 15 inch device the trackpad this has a nice texture and it s a nice size it s big but there s a weird friction when you click on the pad i don t love it not that this is super important but it s something that is not ideal when it comes to this particular trackpad okay the internals there are two nvme slots two ram slots and the traditional two big fans the fan noise is very quiet now msi usually doesn t have super loud systems when it comes to their creator devices and this one s no different but the overall product is quite different in profile from their gaming devices if i had to make a recommendation if you only play games and that s what you do i would never pick up one of the creative devices the advantages that you get with this the screen and the nicer build and the different aesthetics they just make no difference for gamers if anything having a 16 by 10 aspect ratio screen is arguably worse for gaming but if you make videos or you work with photo or any video content or just anything visual content this is a way better screen for that the other thing is battery life the z16 p doesn t have a huge battery but battery life is a little bit shorter than expected the gs77 the ghost that has a fairly average battery life for a device that but overall these are so much better than they were last year okay hope you guys enjoyed this video thumbs if you liked it subs if you loved it i ll see you guys next time

making a performance laptop really thin is super hard i was once told by an engineer from a laptop company that at a certain point if you want to shrink the height of a laptop by another millimeter it s an extra million dollars in r d it s very difficult to do and the thing is a lot of companies chase it they want to make these thinner and thinner devices and it comes with problems right you get thermal issues you get keyboard issues you get just limitations with the device when you go super thin but every company chases it and last year msi was guilty of it they made two devices i got them in they were way too thin the performance wasn t great i didn t even cover them but this year they didn t fall into that trap and they made these devices so much better so first we have a gaming device the ghost gs77 which is a little bit thicker and completely redesigned it s so much better and there s also the newly updated z16p so this is also a little bit thicker with the vapor chamber and it s a way better experience than it was last year so let s start here the gs77 it s an all new design and honestly i think it s about damn time because every year i ve reviewed the ghost gs whatever it feels the company was always so tunnel visioned on weight and thinness that it just took away from the product it just made the build quality suffer because of that pursuit of thinness and low weight this time around both the top and bottom panels are much more sturdy and the hinge even though it s mounted a little bit closer to the center it is a very solid feeling hinge supposedly it s got some zinc alloy for the components inside to make the hinge but you can just tell when you open and close this thing it just seems a properly built hinge but the more prominent example of better build quality is the cpanel the keyboard deck every year when they make a ghost product this deck up here has some perforation or grill where the air flow goes in they ve completely redesigned the thermal system so they don t need to rely on a grill anymore and just the top panels are so much better it s something that s bugged me forever about these devices it s good now finally the internals this time are also a more traditional layout so in the past the ghost products have had this flipped motherboard which i think kept the device a little bit thinner but it made serviceability much more difficult this time you have access to both ram slots your drives your wi fi card you have access to all of it and you can see that there s two big fans instead of a series of smaller fans and i think it helps just with the entire thermal system the keyboard s also been completely revamped it still has a number pad on the right but the keys are just a little bit more square more chiclet a little bit larger it s a nicer typing experience to me the rgb lighting is controllable in the software but it s not a particularly bright or vibrant series of rgbs that s i don t know more muted than you would expect on a device this the trackpad s a little bit bigger this year and i don t think there s anything i would complain about it s a average trackpad there is a fingerprint sensor on the rights for 1080p gaming it s great for 1440p gaming the gpu however isn t the highest wattage option out there so there s going to be devices out there usually thicker that will have better performance with the same gpu but i think they ve done a really good job balancing performance with the thickness of the product and what s also interesting is the fan noise so traditionally when it comes to this product category the ghost gs products they have loud fans of the top end and it s not something you can avoid right super thin device with hot components you gotta crank the fans this time around it is so much quieter than i expected now on one hand i that i m someone who appreciates quiet systems and this is a quieter gaming laptop but on the other hand this is msi this is a company that so frequently pushes their systems hard and loud to get the best possible performance and i m surprised they capped this gpu at 105 watts i felt if you squeeze the fans a little bit harder it could have time and refresh rate are top tier it is a 16 by 9 aspect ratio though so you do get a pretty sizable chin i personally this type of aspect ratio when it comes to gaming laptops but everyone s different and there s also a 1080p webcam up top the port layout is also quite different this year they really did change everything you got three ports on the back so you got your ac adapter your hdmi port as well as your ethernet and these are the ones that you don t disconnect and reconnect frequently right this is just stuff you have plugged in or not and that s just going out the back of the device keeps your sides clear and then all the removable stuff goes on the side so you have two usb a two usbc and a full size sd but the overall product is just way better than the ghost line has engineering process for this product line stupid they were just trying to chase something that was not achievable and i think every year people complain this is a great device except it s not well making a performance laptop really thin is super hard i was once told by an engineer from a laptop company that at a certain point if you want to shrink the height of a laptop by another millimeter it s an extra million dollars in r d it s very difficult to do and the thing is a lot of companies chase it they want to make these thinner and thinner devices and it comes with problems right you get thermal issues you get keyboard issues you get just limitations with the device when you go super thin but every company chases it and last year msi was guilty of it they made two devices i got them in they were way too thin the performance wasn t great i didn t even cover them but this year they didn t fall into that trap and they made these devices so much better so first we have a gaming device the ghost gs77 which is a little bit thicker and completely redesigned it s so much better and there s also the newly updated z16p so this is also a little bit thicker with the vapor chamber and it s a way better experience than it was last year so let s start here the gs77 it s an all new design and honestly i think it s about damn time because every year i ve reviewed the ghost gs whatever it feels the company was always so tunnel visioned on weight and thinness that it just took away from the product it just made the build quality suffer because of that pursuit of thinness and low weight this time around both the top and bottom panels are much more sturdy and the hinge even though it s mounted a little bit closer to the center it is a very solid feeling hinge supposedly it s got some zinc alloy for the components inside to make the hinge but you can just tell when you open and close this thing it just seems a properly built hinge but the more prominent example of better build quality is the cpanel the keyboard deck every year when they make a ghost product this deck up here has some perforation or grill where the air flow goes in they ve completely redesigned the thermal system so they don t need to rely on a grill anymore and just the top panels are so much better it s something that s bugged me forever about these devices it s good now finally the internals this time are also a more traditional layout so in the past the ghost products have had this flipped motherboard which i think kept the device a little bit thinner but it made serviceability much more difficult this time you have access to both ram slots your drives your wi fi card you have access to all of it and you can see that there s two big fans instead of a series of smaller fans and i think it helps just with the entire thermal system the keyboard s also been completely revamped it still has a number pad on the right but the keys are just a little bit more square more chiclet a little bit larger it s a nicer typing experience to me the rgb lighting is controllable in the software but it s not a particularly bright or vibrant series of rgbs that s i don t know more muted than you would expect on a device this the trackpad s a little bit bigger this year and i don t think there s anything i would complain about it s a average trackpad there is a fingerprint sensor on the rights which i don t love the aesthetics of it but it s there if you need it now let s talk about performance this is running a 3070 ti with the 12700h from intel and it s a great performer it s really good for 1080p gaming it s great for 1440p gaming the gpu however isn t the highest wattage option out there so there s going to be devices out there usually thicker that will have better performance with the same gpu but i think they ve done a really good job balancing performance with the thickness of the product and what s also interesting is the fan noise so traditionally when it comes to this product category the ghost gs products they have loud fans of the top end and it s not something you can avoid right super thin device with hot components you gotta crank the fans this time around it is so much quieter than i expected now on one hand i that i m someone who appreciates quiet systems and this is a quieter gaming laptop but on the other hand this is msi this is a company that so frequently pushes their systems hard and loud to get the best possible performance and i m surprised they capped this gpu at 105 watts i felt if you squeeze the fans a little bit harder it could have gone another 10 or 15 watts this system does not have a mux switch though some people get super sweaty about this stuff for the games that most people are playing at this type of resolution a muk switch isn t super important but still would have been nice to have seen the panel itself is a really nice gaming panel it s not as color accurate as the creative devices but it s super fast response time and refresh rate are top tier it is a 16 by 9 aspect ratio though so you do get a pretty sizable chin i personally this type of aspect ratio when it comes to gaming laptops but everyone s different and there s also a 1080p webcam up top the port layout is also quite different this year they really did change everything you got three ports on the back so you got your ac adapter your hdmi port as well as your ethernet and these are the ones that you don t disconnect and reconnect frequently right this is just stuff you have plugged in or not and that s just going out the back of the device keeps your sides clear and then all the removable stuff goes on the side so you have two usb a two usbc and a full size sd but the overall product is just way better than the ghost line has ever been it s finally properly made for a gaming device now i honestly think that they went down this trap of the pursuit of thinness and lightness and it just made the whole manufacturing engineering process for this product line stupid they were just trying to chase something that was not achievable and i think every year people complain this is a great device except it s not well made and the thermal issues and there s limitations it s all gone i think they fixed so much stuff of it this year it is a big device if you re looking for a 17 inch device though this is a really solid one also the pricing so i don t know exact pricing yet because it s pretty early on in the launch cycle but from what i ve seen this thing starts at eighteen hundred dollars and when it comes to thin performance devices of this caliber that s definitely one of the cheaper ones all right that s the gs77 next up where did i put it i ll be right back the z 16 p and this is a device that s a little more my speed so this is a great gaming device but it s also a great device for content creators so last year they had the z16 cool looking device very similar aesthetic to this but it was really thin to the point where they could only put an rtx 3060 in it and that was capped at 65 watts this year a little bit thicker vapor chamber now they ve bumped up that gpu limit to 95 watts and you can get up to 3080 ti it s just a way more thermally capable system now what separates this device from the average gaming laptop out there is two things first is the design aesthetic of it it s a much more elegant looking more muted matte gray finish to it it s got a nice machined elegant look to it but it s the screen this is the main difference between every other gaming laptop out there so this is a 16 by 10 aspect ratio screen but it s got amazing color characteristics it s super color accurate very bright but it still has a 165 hertz refresh rate so it s awesome for playing games on it now it is a glossy panel if you can catch it yeah you can see that reflection up there of the light it is a glossy panel and it s macbooks right they have the glossy finish it s something that not everyone s gonna appreciate and if you re playing games on it only and you have super bright environments and you can t control the lighting then this can be annoying but for me personally i love glossy screens i ve done videos on this in the past but it s just the option of having really nice color the moment you put on any matte finish you re just throwing a diffusion layer on the screen right and just colors are gonna be less vibrant having it glossy this is i love it but everyone s different now for creative work this is awesome and also this screen goes all the way back so if you have the pen you can use it for digital illustration and you have a nice glass surface to work on and if you ll notice when i open and close the device you can see the hinge just raises the device for some better airflow on the bottom but it s a overall way better performer than the z16 last year now performance wise we re looking at a fast cpu and a fast gpu but because this gpu is capped at 95 watts it isn t going to be as fast as that gs77 but for a 15 16 inch device this is a very solid performer now there is the same perforated grille at the top of the keyboard last year s device but the z series never had the same build quality issues as the ghost gs products did so this has always been a very solid feeling device the keyboard isn t my favorite it types well but it does feel a little cramped to me to have a number pad on a 15 inch device the trackpad this has a nice texture and it s a nice size it s big but there s a weird friction when you click on the pad i don t love it not that this is super important but it s something that is not ideal when it comes to this particular trackpad okay the internals there are two nvme slots two ram slots and the traditional two big fans the fan noise is very quiet now msi usually doesn t have super loud systems when it comes to their creator devices and this one s no different but the overall product is quite different in profile from their gaming devices if i had to make a recommendation if you only play games and that s what you do i would never pick up one of the creative devices the advantages that you get with this the screen and the nicer build and the different aesthetics they just make no difference for gamers if anything having a 16 by 10 aspect ratio screen is arguably worse for gaming but if you make videos or you work with photo or any video content or just anything visual content this is a way better screen for that the other thing is battery life the z16 p doesn t have a huge battery but battery life is a little bit shorter than expected the gs77 the ghost that has a fairly average battery life for a device that but overall these are so much better than they were last year okay hope you guys enjoyed this video thumbs if you liked it subs if you loved it i ll see you guys next time
